          },

          },

            "text": "func (u *URLTest) ListenPacketContext(ctx context.Context, metadata *C.Metadata) (C.PacketConn, error) {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "\tproxy := u.fast(true)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\tpc, err := proxy.ListenPacketContext(ctx, metadata)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\tif err == nil {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "\t\tpc.AppendToChains(u)"

          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "\t} else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,

          },

            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "// Unwrap implements C.ProxyAdapter"

          },
          {

          },

            "text": "func (u *URLTest) fast(touch bool) C.Proxy {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\telm, _, shared := u.fastSingle.Do(func() (C.Proxy, error) {"

          {

          {

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\t\tfast := proxies[0]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\t\tminDelay := fast.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\t\tfastNotExist := true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\t\tfor _, proxy := range proxies[1:] {"
          },
          {

            "text": "\t\t\tif u.fastNode != nil \u0026\u0026 proxy.Name() == u.fastNode.Name() {"
          },
          {

            "text": "\t\t\t\tfastNotExist = false"

            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\t\t\tif !proxy.AliveForTestUrl(u.testUrl) {"
          },
          {

            "text": "\t\t\t\tcontinue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\t\t\tdelay := proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "\t\t\tif delay \u003c minDelay {"
          },
          {

            "text": "\t\t\t\tfast = proxy"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\t\t// tolerance"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\t\tif u.fastNode == nil || fastNotExist || !u.fastNode.AliveForTestUrl(u.testUrl) || u.fastNode.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl) \u003e fast.LastDelayForTestUrl(u.testUrl)+u.tolerance {"

          },

            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "// SupportUDP implements C.ProxyAdapter"

          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "export const AppDataProvider = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "  // 启动时触发 url-test/fallback 组的测速，然后轮询代理数据直到各组的 now 已更新或达到最大次数"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "    if (!proxiesData?.groups?.length || hasTriggeredStartupFallback.current) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "      return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "    const groups = proxiesData.groups as IProxyGroupItem[];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "    const urlTestOrFallback = groups.filter("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "      (g) =\u003e g.type === \"url-test\" || g.type === \"fallback\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "    if (urlTestOrFallback.length === 0) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "    hasTriggeredStartupFallback.current = true;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    initialNowByGroupRef.current = new Map("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "      urlTestOrFallback.map((g) =\u003e [g.name, g.now ?? \"\"]),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    pollingCountRef.current = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "    // 标记测速，在此后 10 秒内不发送 fallback 切换通知"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "    markManualDelayCheckStarted();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "    const scheduleNextPoll = () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "      pollingTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "        pollingTimerRef.current = null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        pollingCountRef.current += 1;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        refreshProxy().catch(() =\u003e {});"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "        if (pollingCountRef.current \u003c POLL_MAX_COUNT) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "          scheduleNextPoll();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "      }, POLL_INTERVAL_MS);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "    const run = async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "      await Promise.allSettled("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        urlTestOrFallback.map((g) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "          const url = delayManager.getUrl(g.name);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "          const timeout = g.timeout ?? 5000;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "          return delayGroup(g.name, url, timeout);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "        }),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "      );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "      await refreshProxy();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "      pollingCountRef.current += 1;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "      scheduleNextPoll();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "    void run();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "    return () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "      if (pollingTimerRef.current != null) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "        clearTimeout(pollingTimerRef.current);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "        pollingTimerRef.current = null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "  }, [proxiesData, refreshProxy]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "  // 每次代理数据更新后检查：若至少有一个组的 now 相对「首次加载」初始值变化，或已达最大轮询次数，则停止首次轮询"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 527,
            "text": ";"
          }

            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "func HealthCheck(name string) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\tp := tunnel.Proxies()[name]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\t\treturn"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\tg, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ProxyGroup)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\tif !ok {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\t\tlog.Warnln(\"Request health check for &#96;%s&#96;: invalid type %s\", name, p.Type().String())"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,

            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\t// 测速时清空手动选择状态，使所有节点都不再是“手动选择”"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\tif clearable, ok := p.Adapter().(outboundgroup.ClearManualSelectionAble); ok {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\t\tclearable.ClearManualSelection()"
          },

            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\twg := \u0026sync.WaitGroup{}"

          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\tfor _, pr := range g.Providers() {"

          {

            "text": "\t\twg.Add(1)"

          },

            "text": "\t\tgo func(provider provider.ProxyProvider) {"

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },

          {

          },

            "text": "// HealthCheckWithTimeout 使用自定义超时时间（毫秒）和并发节点数对指定代理组执行健康检查。"

          },
          {

          {

            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "// DialContext implements C.ProxyAdapter"

          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "  async checkListDelay("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "    nameList: string[],"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 426,

            "text": "    concurrency = 36,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "    /** 本次测速会话的开始时间戳（ms）。提供后只复用本次会话中已测出的新结果，不复用历史缓存。 */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 430,

          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "  ) {"

            "lineNumber": 432,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "    debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "      &#96;[DelayManager] 批量测试开始 组:${group} 数量:${names.length} 并发:${concurrency} timeout:${timeout}ms&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "    );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "    const startTime = Date.now();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "    let reusedCount = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438,
            "text": "    let apiCallCount = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "    // 设置正在延迟测试中"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "    names.forEach((name) =\u003e this.setDelay(name, group, -2));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "    let index = 0;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "    const listener = this.groupListenerMap.get(group);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "    const help = async (): Promise\u003cvoid\u003e =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "      const currName = names[index++];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "      if (!currName) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "      const nodeStart = Date.now();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "      try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "        this.setDelay(currName, group, -2);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 453
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454,
            "text": "        if (index \u003e 1) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 455,
            "text": "          await new Promise((resolve) =\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456,
            "text": "            setTimeout(resolve, Math.random() * 200),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 457,
            "text": "          );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 459
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460,
            "text": "        const hadReusable = this.getReusableDelayForName(currName, group, sessionStart) != null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 461,
            "text": "        await this.checkDelay(currName, group, timeout, { sessionStart });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 462,
            "text": "        const nodeElapsed = Date.now() - nodeStart;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 463,
            "text": "        if (hadReusable) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464,
            "text": "          reusedCount += 1;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 465,
            "text": "        } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466,
            "text": "          apiCallCount += 1;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467,
            "text": "          debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 468,
            "text": "            &#96;[DelayManager] 单节点API 代理:${currName} 耗时:${nodeElapsed}ms&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469,
            "text": "          );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 470,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471,
            "text": "        if (listener) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 472,
            "text": "          this.queueGroupNotification(group);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 473,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "      } catch (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "        console.error("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "          &#96;[DelayManager] 批量测试单个代理出错，代理: ${currName}&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "          error,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "        );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "        this.setDelay(currName, group, 1e6);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "      return help();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "    };"

          {
            "lineNumber": 484
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "func (f *Fallback) findAliveProxy(touch bool) C.Proxy {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\tproxies := f.GetProxies(touch)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "\ttimeoutMs := f.TestTimeout"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "\tif timeoutMs \u003c= 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\t\ttimeoutMs = 5000"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\t// 手动选择模式：无条件返回用户选择的节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "\t// 健康检测由 Set() 的异步 goroutine 负责，这里不阻止用户的选择"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\tif len(f.selected) \u003e 0 {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\t\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\t\t\tif proxy.Name() == f.selected {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn proxy // 直接返回，不检查延迟或健康状态"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\t\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "\t\t// 选择的节点不存在于列表中（可能被移除），清空选择"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\t\tf.selected = \"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\t// 自动模式：返回第一个可用的节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "\t\t// Only use proxy if alive and delay is within group timeout"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\t\tif proxy.AliveForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u0026\u0026 proxy.LastDelayForTestUrl(f.testUrl) \u003c= uint16(timeoutMs) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\t\t\treturn proxy"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\t\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\t}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\t// No proxy is alive within timeout: use the one with minimum delay (least bad) instead of always the first"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\tvar best C.Proxy"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\tminDelay := uint16(0xffff)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "\tfor _, proxy := range proxies {"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": " * sort the proxy"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "function sortProxies("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "  proxies: IProxyItem[],"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "  groupName: string,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "  sortType: ProxySortType,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "  latencyTimeout?: number,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": ") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "  if (!proxies) return [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "  if (sortType === 0) return proxies;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "  const list = proxies.slice();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "  const effectiveTimeout ="
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "    typeof latencyTimeout === \"number\" \u0026\u0026 latencyTimeout \u003e 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "      ? latencyTimeout"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "      : DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "  if (sortType === 1) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "    const categorizeDelay = (delay: number): [number, number] =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "      if (!Number.isFinite(delay)) return [3, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "      if (delay \u003e 1e5) return [4, delay];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "      if (delay === 0 || (delay \u003e= effectiveTimeout \u0026\u0026 delay \u003c= 1e5)) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "        return [3, delay || effectiveTimeout];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "      if (delay \u003c 0) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "        // sentinel delays (-1, -2, etc.) should always sort after real measurements"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "        return [5, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "      }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "      return [0, delay];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "    const delayMap = delayManager.getDelaysForGroupFix(groupName, list);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "    list.sort((a, b) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "      const ad = delayMap.get(a.name) ?? -1;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "      const bd = delayMap.get(b.name) ?? -1;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "      const [ar, av] = categorizeDelay(ad);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "      const [br, bv] = categorizeDelay(bd);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "      if (ar !== br) return ar - br;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "      return av - bv;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "  } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "    list.sort((a, b) =\u003e a.name.localeCompare(b.name));"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "  return list;"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 221
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 172
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\clash-verge-rev\\src\\components\\proxy\\use-filter-sort.ts",
        "signatures": {}
      },
      "score": 0.30561330914497375
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "export const useRenderList = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": " [proxiesData, mode, refreshProxy]);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "  // 链式代理模式节点自动计算延迟"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "    if (!isChainMode || !runtimeConfig) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    const allProxies: IProxyItem[] = Object.values("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "      (runtimeConfig as any).proxies || {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    if (allProxies.length === 0) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "    // 设置组监听器，当有延迟更新时自动刷新"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "    const groupListener = () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "      debugLog(\"[ChainMode] 延迟更新，刷新UI\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "      refreshProxy();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "    };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "    delayManager.setGroupListener(\"chain-mode\", groupListener);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    const calculateDelays = async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "      try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "        const timeout = 5000;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        const proxyNames = allProxies.map((proxy) =\u003e proxy.name);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "        debugLog(&#96;[ChainMode] 开始计算 ${proxyNames.length} 个节点的延迟&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "        // 使用 delayManager 计算延迟，每个节点计算完成后会自动触发监听器刷新界面"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        delayManager.checkListDelay(proxyNames, \"chain-mode\", timeout);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "      } catch (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,

            "text": "export const useCloseAllWithDelayCheck = "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "const handleCloseAllWithDelayCheck = async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "      // 自动切换到每个组第一个连接成功的节点（只处理 URLTest 和 Fallback，不处理 Selector）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "      for (const group of groups) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        if (!group.all || group.all.length === 0) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        if (![\"URLTest\", \"Fallback\"].includes(group.type)) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "        const timeout = group?.timeout ?? DEFAULT_GROUP_TIMEOUT_MS;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "        // 按照组中节点的原始顺序（group.all）查找第一个连接成功的节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        // 这样可以确保选择的是排序最靠前的成功节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "        let firstSuccessProxy: string | null = null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "        "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "        for (const proxy of group.all) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "          const proxyName = typeof proxy === \"string\" ? proxy : proxy.name;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "          if (!proxyName) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "          "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "          // 跳过 DIRECT、REJECT 和 provider 节点"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "          if (proxyName === \"DIRECT\" || proxyName === \"REJECT\") continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "          const proxyRecord = proxiesData.records?.[proxyName];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "          if (proxyRecord?.provider) continue;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "          "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "          // 检查该节点是否连接成功"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "          const delayUpdate = delayManager.getDelayUpdate(proxyName, group.name);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "          if (delayUpdate) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "            const delay = delayUpdate.delay;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "            const delayText = delayManager.formatDelay(delay, timeout);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "            "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "            // 判断是否连接成功：不是T、E、-、testing，且delay \u003e 0"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "            if ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"T\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"E\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"-\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "              delayText !== \"testing\" \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "              delay \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "              delay \u003c timeout \u0026\u0026"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "              delay \u003c= 1e5"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "            ) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "              // 找到第一个连接成功的节点（按原始顺序）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "              firstSuccessProxy = proxyName;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "              debugLog("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "                &#96;[CloseAll] Found first success proxy for group ${group.name}: ${proxyName} (delay: ${delay}ms)&#96;,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "              );"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "              break;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "          }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "        // 如果找到连接成功的节点，且当前节点不是它，则切换"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
This is a critical finding regarding the Desktop REST API's `getGroupDelay` endpoint at `/group/{name}/delay`. The Desktop REST API's `getGroupDelay` endpoint spawns unlimited goroutines per proxy without limiting concurrency, using a single shared context timeout for all operations. In contrast, Android's `HealthCheckWithTimeout` uses a semaphore with a default concurrency limit of 30 per provider and individual timeouts per proxy. For a group with 200 nodes, this difference in approach could lead to resource exhaustion or performance issues in the API endpoint.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

已从本仓库里把「代理页测速」的调用链捋清了，结论可以分两类：**整组测速更久**，以及**单个节点显示的毫秒数偏大**。

## 1. 整组测速明显更慢：安卓有「并发上限」，电脑 REST 是「全节点一起测」

代理页点测速时，安卓走的是 `HealthCheckWithTimeout`（Java → JNI → Go），在 Go 里对每个节点用**信号量限制同时测速数量**（默认 **30**，可在界面里改成 10～50）：

```82:116:f:\work\ClashMetaForAndroid\core\src\main\golang\native\tunnel\connectivity.go
	if concurrency <= 0 {
		concurrency = 30
	}
	sem := make(chan struct{}, concurrency)
	// ...
			for _, px := range proxies {
				innerWg.Add(1)

				sem <- struct{}{} // 获取令牌，最多 30 个并发

				go func(proxy C.Proxy) {
					defer innerWg.Done()
					defer func() { <-sem }() // 释放令牌

					ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), timeout)
					defer cancel()

					_, _ = proxy.URLTest(ctx, testURL, nil)
				}(px)
			}
```

而桌面端若走核心自带的 **`GET /group/{name}/delay`**，会走到 `GroupBase.URLTest`：对组内每个节点**各起一个 goroutine，没有类似 30 的并发上限**，等于「能开多少就开多少」一起测：

```224:243:f:\work\ClashMetaForAndroid\core\src\foss\golang\clash\adapter\outboundgroup\groupbase.go
func (gb *GroupBase) URLTest(ctx context.Context, url string, expectedStatus utils.IntRanges[uint16]) (map[string]uint16, error) {
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	var lock sync.Mutex
	mp := map[string]uint16{}
	proxies := gb.GetProxies(false)
	for _, proxy := range proxies {
		proxy := proxy
		wg.Add(1)
		go func() {
			delay, err := proxy.URLTest(ctx, url, expectedStatus)
			// ...
			wg.Done()
		}()
	}
	wg.Wait()
```

因此节点一多，安卓会按「每批最多 N 个」排队，**总耗时常明显长于电脑**；这不是同一节点协议不同，而是**批测策略不同**。

## 2. 测速 URL 可能不一致

安卓路径里对每个 **provider** 用 `prov.HealthCheckURL()`，空才退回到 `https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204`：

```95:98:f:\work\ClashMetaForAndroid\core\src\main\golang\native\tunnel\connectivity.go
			testURL := prov.HealthCheckURL()
			if testURL == "" {
				testURL = "https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204"
			}
```

电脑端若用外部控制面，往往用**统一的一个测速 URL**（例如订阅里 `proxy-groups` 的 `url` 或面板里配置的地址）。**目标 URL 不同**时，延迟数字和 TLS 路径都会不同，不能直接当「同一条件」比。

## 3. 单个节点数字仍可能偏大：环境与本机设置

在「同一节点、同一 URL」的前提下，核心里单次测速都是 `Proxy.URLTest`（HEAD + 可选 `unified-delay` 第二次请求）。仍可能更慢的原因包括：

- **网络**：手机蜂窝/WiFi 与电脑有线/WiFi 的 RTT、丢包、运营商 QoS 不同。  
- **本机配置**：若开启 **`unified-delay`**，测速会做**两次**请求，总占用时间更长（可在元功能/覆写里核对）。  
- **默认超时**：安卓 UI 里测速超时默认 **5000ms**（见 `UiStore`），不加快成功请求，但失败/卡顿时等待会更久，体感像「更拖」。

## 4. 与测速无关但容易误会的一点

切换节点后有一条 **`delay(3500L)`** 再刷新该组，这是为了**晚一点再拉一次组数据**，和测速按钮不是同一条路径：

```151:155:f:\work\ClashMetaForAndroid\app\src\main\java\com\github\kr328\clash\ProxyActivity.kt
                                reloadGroup()
                                // 选择后 3.5s 时查询一次，仅刷新当前选中节点所在组
                                delay(3500L)
                                if (idx in names.indices) reloadGroup()
```

---

**简要结论**：安卓代理页测速更慢，**最主要原因是实现上用了有上限的并发（默认 30）逐批测**，而电脑通过 `/group/.../delay` 时往往是**组内全并行**；再叠加**测速 URL 是否一致**、**网络环境**和可选的 **`unified-delay`**。若你希望安卓整组更接近电脑速度，可在代理页把**并发**调高（例如 50），并确认**测速 URL**与电脑使用的一致。
